rationale: Flaky speculative auth CI test; intermittent failure investigation, no spec rule contradicted.
Serde flatten limitation disrupts human_readable flag; Rust-specific serialization quirk, not a BSON spec rule.
Server selection spec requires filtering arbiters and unavailable servers; predicate selection skipped that filter.
Accidental omission of public re-exports in lib.rs; API visibility bug, no spec behavior involved.
Atlas proxy omits dbname field and uses PKCS8 keys; Atlas-specific compatibility, no named spec rule violated.
Internal refactor removing driver's own raw BSON in favor of library's; no behavior change or spec rule.
Issue split from DRIVERS-1983; updating load balancer spec test files for dedicated LB port.
Test runner not asserting all fields from JSON spec tests; updating test assertions to fully conform.
MSRV bump to 1.49 due to tokio dependency; build/dependency change, no spec behavior.
Test refactor removing unnecessary async annotations; internal test cleanup, no spec behavior.
junit-report-merger npm install fails on macOS CI hosts; CI tooling bug, no driver spec involvement.
Lossy UTF-8 for writeErrors; Node/Python mentioned as background context, no spec requirement for lossy decoding.
Issue split from DRIVERS-1750, Improvement; proactive spec rollout implementing hello command support.
Issue split DRIVERS-746, Bug; retryable spec requires retry on handshake failure; driver did not implement this.
Rust serde map-with-enum-keys deserialization fails from binary; Rust-specific bug, no BSON spec rule.
Issue split from DRIVERS-2033, Improvement; proactive spec rollout for hello+OP_MSG in load-balanced mode.
Fuzzer-found crash in raw BSON deserializer; implementation safety bug, no specific BSON spec rule violated.
Rustls lacks shared cipher with Atlas M10+; TLS library compatibility issue, no spec rule.
MongoDB Handshake spec requires platforms field in client metadata; driver omits it when rustc unavailable at runtime.
Replacing chrono with time crate to make dependency optional; dependency change, no spec behavior.
Issue split from DRIVERS-1995, Improvement; proactive spec rollout for lenient change stream event parsing.
Description quotes spec MUST: raise error and close connection when messageLength > maxMessageSizeBytes; driver unimplemented.
Issue split from DRIVERS-2228, Improvement; proactive spec rollout switching estimatedDocumentCount to count command.
docs.rs build fails due to rustc_version_runtime writing to read-only src dir; build/packaging bug.
Feature request to use sync and async APIs together; API ergonomics, no spec behavior.
Internal SDAM refactor from locks to channels; implementation architecture change, no spec rule.
SDAM spec quoted: client MUST throw error on every operation if setName is null or wrong in Single topology.
Performance regression from tokio-rustls/rustls version bump; perf issue, no spec rule.
Transactions spec: txnNumber required when autocommit:false; commitTransaction retry omits txnNumber causing InvalidOptions.
Issue split from DRIVERS-2249, Improvement; updating docs.mongodb.com links in documentation.
SDAM monitoring spec: ServerDescriptionChanged only when description changes; PartialEq bug emits events unconditionally on error.
Updating uuid crate dependency to 1.0; dependency/packaging change, no spec behavior.
Issue split from DRIVERS-2395; adding spec test asserting reads not retried inside transactions.
Issue split from DRIVERS-2018; adding language-specific AWS Lambda usage examples to documentation.
Spec test runner update: use sort when verifying outcome collections to handle non-deterministic find order.
Improvement implementing new SDAM spec (topologyVersion, stale error handling); proactive spec rollout, not prior violation.
Implementing spec clarification for connectTimeoutMS=0 with streaming protocol; proactive alignment with DRIVERS-1289.
Issue split from DRIVERS-742, Improvement; proactive spec rollout adding comment field support to all helpers.
SDAM spec requires stopping monitor when server removed from topology; driver continues monitoring removed servers.
SDAM spec: heartbeatFrequencyMS must be >= minHeartbeatFrequencyMS; ClientOptions path skips this validation causing panic.
async-std using blocking socket2::connect; async runtime implementation bug, no spec rule violated.
Astrolabe workload executor not writing results.json; CI/testing tooling bug unrelated to driver spec.
Adding TryFrom conversion from Bson to RawBson; API ergonomics addition, no spec rule.
Compilation errors when csfle feature enabled; build breakage due to unstable API and missing method, not spec.
Adding iter_mut to Document type; API ergonomics addition, no spec rule.
Improving ClientEncryption API ergonomics; API design improvement, no spec conformance issue.
Performance optimization for array index serialization using direct byte push; perf, no spec rule.
Issue split from DRIVERS-2489; improving spec test coverage for retryable handshake error scenarios.
Issue split from DRIVERS-2355; CI configuration to test consistent crypt_shared and server versions.
Issue split from DRIVERS-2449, Improvement; proactive spec rollout for skipping mongocryptd when crypt_shared loaded.
